item.name: Air-wheeler A9 Identification Key
item.description: A thin, rectangular piece of what appears to be electrope. Placing it near your air-wheeler A9 will magically bring the vehicle to life.

mount.name: Air-wheeler A9
mount.action: Summon forth your air-wheeler A9. The lights aren't merely for show and actually make it go.
mount.description: Designed and built in Alexandria, this single-rider flying vehicle uses electrope to convert lightning to wind energy, which it expels to produce levitation and propulsion. While air-wheelers are extensively employed by the military, the A9 is a civilian model and does not come fitted with armaments.
mount.tooltip:
I'm looking for an air-wheeler A9.
Have you got any...er...smaller sizes?
- Milalla Customer
